description: Write and execute a Gretl script to automate lag selection for US inflation using the usa.gdt dataset. The script must evaluate lag orders k=1 through k=4 by estimating simple AR models (regressing inf on a constant and its k-th lag) to determine which lag explains the most variation. Record the R-squared value for each lag and save the results, including the lag number and R-squared, to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/lag_screening_report.txt. Save the script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/lag_screening.inp and execute it to generate the report.
